Staff Assessment: News Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers keeping up on news. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
212 F0800P_STF_GRP_ACTVTY_CD F0800P_STF_GRP_ACTVTY_CD F0800P Staff Assessment: Group Activity Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers doing things with groups of people. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip
